title: polygala mediterranea
intro: Polygala mediterranea, also known as the Mediterranean milkwort, is a perennial plant species native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as improving respiratory function, reducing inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, Polygala mediterranea is used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
